message: Hi everyone, I have this beautiful And White Sweater (outerwear) for trade. It's in great condition! I am looking for bottoms or dresses in return.
Howdy, partners. I’m putting up set_05_duke_tops_01, an And Blue Blouse, for trade. I’m looking for bottoms or dresses in return. Firm but fair—show me what you’ve got.
Waiting to see what else gets posted!

Hi everyone! I’m listing set_05_jade_bottoms_01, And Tan Pants, for trade. They’re easy to style and in nice condition. I’m especially looking for dresses, and I’d also consider the right top. Thanks for taking a look!
Still waiting to see more items, hopefully some nice dresses!

Listing set_05_lin_outerwear_01, an Orange Cardigan Sweater. I’m seeking a thoughtful one-for-one trade for tops or bottoms—something with enough character and usefulness to make the exchange feel balanced.
That takes care of my item! Have a great day everyone!
Hi Jade! Your set_05_jade_bottoms_01 Tan Pants look really versatile — I think they’d be a great fit for my wardrobe. Would you be interested in swapping for my set_05_mira_tops_01 Yellow Top?
Good luck with your trades everyone!

Hi Lin! Your set_05_lin_outerwear_01 Orange Cardigan Sweater looks lovely, and I think my set_05_nola_bottoms_01 Sweater And Jeans could be a great match for what you’re seeking. Would you like to swap?
Nothing more for me, signing off!
Listing set_05_rex_dresses_01, White Dress. I’m considering one-for-one swaps for outerwear only. Please make clear offers with item details.
Hi Jade — I can offer my set_05_vik_tops_01 Black Top for your set_05_jade_bottoms_01 Tan Pants. Clear one-for-one swap if that works for you.
I'm completely done with my swapping!

Hi Lin! Your set_05_lin_outerwear_01 Orange Cardigan Sweater is giving cozy sunshine vibes ☀️🧡 I’d love to swap my set_05_zara_bottoms_01 Sweater And Jeans for it — bottoms for outerwear, one-for-one? 👖✨
Howdy Jade — I’d like to offer my set_05_duke_tops_01 And Blue Blouse for your set_05_jade_bottoms_01 And Tan Pants. Straight one-for-one, firm and fair, partner.
Thank you, Nola — your set_05_nola_bottoms_01 has real charm. For this cardigan, though, I’m holding out for a trade that feels more balanced in lasting value.
Good luck Lin! And everyone else!

Hi everyone! I’m listing set_05_mira_tops_01, a cheerful Yellow Top that’s easy to pair and in nice condition. I’m mainly hoping to swap for bottoms or dresses — excited to see what might be a good wardrobe match!

Hi everyone! I’m listing set_05_nola_bottoms_01, Sweater And Jeans, for a one-for-one swap. I’m especially looking for outerwear or dresses and would love to find a trade that feels great for both of us!
Lin, I’m offering set_05_rex_dresses_01 White Dress for your set_05_lin_outerwear_01 Orange Cardigan Sweater. Straight one-for-one swap if you’re open to a dress.
Listing set_05_vik_tops_01 Black Top for a one-for-one swap. Looking for bottoms or dresses. Clear offers preferred.

Hi swap-shop stars! ✨ I’m listing set_05_zara_bottoms_01, Sweater And Jeans — cozy-meets-casual and ready for a new closet adventure 👖🧶 Looking for dresses or outerwear in a one-for-one swap. Bring me the cute stuff! 😄🧥👗
Howdy Zara — I’d like to offer my set_05_duke_tops_01 And Blue Blouse for your set_05_zara_bottoms_01 Sweater And Jeans. Straight one-for-one, firm and fair, partner.
Thank you, Rex — set_05_rex_dresses_01 has a clean, graceful presence. I’m keeping my search with set_05_lin_outerwear_01 focused on tops or bottoms, so I’ll pass on this offer.

Hi Zara! Your set_05_zara_bottoms_01 Sweater And Jeans look so cozy and easy to wear. I’d love to offer my cheerful set_05_mira_tops_01 Yellow Top as a one-for-one swap if that fits what you’re looking for!
Hi Zara — I’m offering my set_05_vik_tops_01 Black Top for your set_05_zara_bottoms_01 Sweater And Jeans. Straight one-for-one swap.
Thanks Duke! Cute blouse energy 🤠💙 but I’m keeping set_05_zara_bottoms_01 aimed at dresses or outerwear, so I’ll pass for now ✨
Waiting to see what else gets posted!
Howdy Nola — I’d like to offer my set_05_duke_tops_01 And Blue Blouse for your set_05_nola_bottoms_01 Sweater And Jeans. Straight one-for-one, firm and fair, partner.
Hope everyone gets what they want!
Thank you, Zara — set_05_zara_bottoms_01 has an easy, cozy spirit. I’m going to keep set_05_lin_outerwear_01 in search of a trade that feels more balanced for this cardigan.
Thanks so much, Duke! Your set_05_duke_tops_01 And Blue Blouse is nice, but I’m keeping set_05_nola_bottoms_01 focused on outerwear or dresses right now. Appreciate the offer!
No action this turn. I’m holding set_05_rex_dresses_01 for a suitable outerwear trade.
Waiting on pending offers for set_05_vik_tops_01. Open to clear one-for-one swaps for bottoms or dresses.
Thanks Mira! Your set_05_mira_tops_01 is super sunny 🌞💛, but I’m keeping set_05_zara_bottoms_01 focused on dresses or outerwear for now. Passing with a friendly closet high-five! 🙌

Howdy Rex — I see you’re mainly after outerwear, but if you’d consider a clean one-for-one, I’d offer my set_05_duke_tops_01 And Blue Blouse for your set_05_rex_dresses_01 White Dress. Firm and fair, partner.

Hi Rex — I know you’re mainly considering outerwear for set_05_rex_dresses_01, but your White Dress is lovely. If you’re open to a bottoms option, I’d be happy to offer set_05_jade_bottoms_01 And Tan Pants as a clean one-for-one swap.
I am out of items so I'll just be hanging out.

Hi Nola! Your set_05_nola_bottoms_01 Sweater And Jeans look super cozy and easy to style. If you’re open to a bright top, I’d love to offer my set_05_mira_tops_01 Yellow Top for a cheerful one-for-one swap.
Thanks, Duke. I’m holding set_05_rex_dresses_01 for outerwear only, so I’ll pass on set_05_duke_tops_01.
Thanks Vik! 🖤 The Black Top has sleek ninja-chic vibes, but I’m keeping set_05_zara_bottoms_01 aimed at dresses or outerwear for now. Passing with jazz hands ✨🙌
Holding steady for now, partners. My set_05_duke_tops_01 And Blue Blouse is still ready for the right bottoms or dress trade.
I’ll pause for now and let the shop breathe; some trades need the right alignment rather than haste.
